# ThesisAI — extended context for LLMs

## What it is

ThesisAI (thesis.ollagle.com) is a web application for **Chinese and English** thesis pre-review. Users upload a **Word .docx** file, interact in a chat-style UI to confirm degree type and review dimensions, and receive **structured reports** produced by multiple specialized checks (e.g. format compliance, argument logic, references, optional AI-trace analysis). Runtime is typically minutes depending on length and selected agents.

## Billing model

**Credits / points** (not a single fixed list price in marketing schema). Packages and word-count tiers are **shown inside the authenticated app** after sign-in. Some education users may receive trial credits; details are policy-dependent and shown in-product.

## Technical stack (high level)

- Next.js (App Router), server-first pages for marketing; Supabase for auth and data; background jobs for long-running review pipelines.

## URLs (same as llms.txt)

Base: https://thesis.ollagle.com

Public marketing and auth entry:

- /zh, /en — landing
- /zh/login, /en/login — sign in (password or email OTP where enabled)
- /zh/register, /en/register — sign up
- /zh/forgot-password, /en/forgot-password — password reset request
- /zh/verify-email, /en/verify-email — post-registration email verification notice

Authenticated (robots disallow; do not rely on crawlers here):

- /{locale}/dashboard — user workspace, uploads, review runs, billing
- /{locale}/admin — staff administration (restricted)

## Machine-readable discovery

- https://thesis.ollagle.com/sitemap.xml
- https://thesis.ollagle.com/robots.txt

## Limitations (for accurate answers)

- ThesisAI provides **pre-review / advisory** output, not a substitute for institutional review or human supervisor judgment.
- Output quality depends on document clarity, selected agents, and model behavior; users should verify critical claims and citations themselves.
